$comment: Cross-language @d2Resilience result-predicate parity fixtures for the NESTED-model
+ array-of-MODEL shape (the placeOrderV2 fixture op). Each row feeds an identically-
shaped reconstructed D2Result<PlaceOrderV2Output> to the emitted C# predicate
(PlaceOrderV2ResiliencePredicates.SR_RetryWhen / SR_FailWhen) AND the emitted TS predicate
(placeOrderV2RetryWhen / placeOrderV2FailWhen), asserting BOTH produce the same retry / fail
booleans. A divergence means the cross-language emission of the deep `?.`-chain or the
array-of-model quantifier has broken and MUST be surfaced, not silently reconciled.
The predicate under test (from resilience-predicate-shaped.tsp placeOrderV2):
Non-vacuity hinges on EXERCISING the nested path + the array-of-model quantifier:
rows traverse customer.tier (present TRIAL → true; present non-TRIAL → false; customer
absent → the deep ?.-chain short-circuits to false) and lines[].status (any PENDING →
true; none PENDING → false; empty lines → vacuous-false .any AND count==0 failWhen).
`data` null models a failure with no payload (the nullable D2Result.Data); both runtimes
must short-circuit a null/undefined data path to false (never throw).

cases.name: retryWhen_nestedCustomerTierTrial
cases.$note: nested-optional path present & == TRIAL → retryWhen true via customer.tier; lines non-empty so failWhen false.

cases.name: neither_nestedCustomerTierPaid
cases.$note: nested path present but != TRIAL → that arm false; no PENDING line → .any false; lines non-empty + no VALIDATION_FAILED → failWhen false. Pins the deep ?.-chain resolves a present-but-non-matching value (not a vacuous true).

cases.name: retryWhen_arrayOfModelAnyPending
cases.$note: customer absent (deep ?.-chain → false) but a line.status == PENDING → array-of-model .any true → retryWhen true. Pins the quantifier's element sub-predicate.

cases.name: neither_arrayOfModelNonePending_noCustomer
cases.$note: customer absent + no PENDING line → both retryWhen arms false; lines non-empty + clean → failWhen false. Pins .any returns false (not vacuous) when elements exist but none match.

cases.name: failWhen_emptyLinesCountZero_vacuousAny
cases.$note: empty lines → .any vacuous-false (retryWhen false, no customer) AND lines.count == 0 → failWhen true. Pins empty-collection semantics for BOTH the quantifier and the count.

cases.name: failWhenWins_trialAndEmptyLines
cases.$note: customer.tier == TRIAL → retryWhen true (nested path); empty lines → failWhen true (count==0). Both fire — failWhen WINS in the client closure (no retry). Pins the nested path AND the count terminal in one row.

cases.name: failWhen_errorCodeValidationFailed_nullData
cases.$note: null data → deep ?.-chain + .any + count all short-circuit (retryWhen false; count coalesces to 0 so failWhen true via count too) AND errorCode == VALIDATION_FAILED. Pins null-data never throws across the nested/array accessors.

cases.name: neither_cleanSuccess_paidCustomerShippedLine
cases.$note: a clean success: nested path present non-TRIAL + no PENDING line + non-empty + no error → neither predicate fires (the default path).
